title: Silence villager
body:
This resource pack is called Silence Villagers. It removes almost all villager sounds in Minecraft 🏡 while keeping the trade sound. If you have a big village or a trading hall, you know how loud and distracting villagers can get. With this pack, their constant “hmm” and work noises are gone, leaving your world calmer and easier to enjoy.


---

Unlike full mute packs, this one keeps the trade sound ✅. You still hear the important feedback when a trade happens, but none of the background chatter.


---

⚡ Features

Removes villager ambient and work sounds

Silences celebrate, hurt, death, yes/no, and more

Keeps trade sound for clear interaction feedback

Lightweight and ready for Minecraft 1.20+



---

By AmirMiner 👤
